mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_route(tenant_id, tenant_model_id, inbound_protocol, enabled, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{tenantId}, #{tenantModelId}, #{inboundProtocol}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, tenant_model_id, inbound_protocol, enabled, remark, deleted_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM model_route WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT r.id, r.tenant_id, r.tenant_model_id, r.inbound_protocol, r.enabled, r.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM route_target t WHERE t.model_route_id = r.id AND t.deleted_at IS NULL) AS target_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM model_route r WHERE r.tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.inbound_protocol ASC, r.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE model_route SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE model_route SET remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE model_route SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model_route WHERE tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM route_target t JOIN model_route r ON r.id = t.model_route_id WHERE r.tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
